get.description: Returns all accounts in the current organization.

post.description: Creates a new account in the current organization.

get.description: Returns all webhook actions for the current organization.

post.description: Creates a new webhook action.

get.description: Returns a single action by ID.

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns access and refresh tokens.
Exchanges a refresh token for new access and refresh tokens.
Creates a new account in the specified organization.

get.description: Returns the automation configuration for the current organization.

parameters.description: Optional channel name to get channel-specific config
parameters.name: channel

schema.description: Optional channel name to get channel-specific config

put.description: Creates or updates the automation configuration.

get.description: Returns all automation triggers for the current organization.

post.description: Creates a new automation trigger.

get.description: Returns a single trigger by ID.
Returns all automation workflows for the current organization.

post.description: Creates a new automation workflow.

get.description: Returns a single workflow by ID.
Returns all campaigns for the current organization.

post.description: Creates a new broadcast campaign.

get.description: Returns a single campaign by ID.

put.description: Updates an existing campaign (only allowed in draft status).

post.description: Cancels a campaign (cannot be restarted).
Pauses a running campaign.

get.description: Returns all recipients for a campaign.

post.description: Adds recipients to a campaign.
Starts sending a draft campaign.

get.description: Returns all WhatsApp channels for the current organization.

post.description: Creates a new WhatsApp channel.

get.description: Returns a single channel by ID.
Returns all contacts for the current organization.

post.description: Creates or retrieves an existing contact by channel and phone number.

get.description: Returns a single contact by ID.

put.description: Assigns a contact to an account.

get.description: Returns messages for a contact with pagination.

parameters.description: Maximum number of messages to return (default 50, max 200)
parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of messages to return (default 50, max 200)

post.description: Sends a message to a contact.
Marks a contact's conversation as read.

put.description: Replaces all tags on a contact.

get.description: Returns audit events for the current organization with optional filters.

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return
parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of results to return

get.description: Returns a single audit event by ID.
Returns all analytics panels for the current organization.

post.description: Creates a new analytics panel.

get.description: Returns a single panel by ID.
Returns the computed data for a panel.
Returns all AI contexts for the current organization.

post.description: Creates a new AI context.

get.description: Returns a single AI context by ID.

post.description: Returns a presigned URL the client can download media from directly. The key must belong to the caller's organization.
Returns a presigned URL the client can upload a file to directly, plus the storage key to reference when sending the message.

get.description: Returns the organization from the authenticated user's token.
Returns all organizations the authenticated user has access to.

post.description: Creates a new organization.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile.
Returns all handoffs for the current organization.

post.description: Creates a new conversation handoff to a human agent.
Picks the next available handoff from the queue.

put.description: Assigns a handoff to a specific agent.
Resumes automation for a handoff (returns conversation to bot).

get.description: Returns all snippets for the current organization.

post.description: Creates a new text snippet.

get.description: Returns a single snippet by ID.
Returns all catalog stores for the current organization.

post.description: Creates a new catalog store.

get.description: Returns a single store by ID.
Returns all products in a store.

post.description: Creates a new product in a store.

get.description: Returns all tags for the current organization.

post.description: Creates a new tag in the current organization.

get.description: Returns all teams for the current organization.

post.description: Creates a new agent team.

get.description: Returns a single team by ID.
Returns all agents in a team.

post.description: Adds an account as an agent to a team.

delete.description: Removes an agent from a team.

parameters.description: Account ID of the agent to remove
parameters.name: agent_id

schema.description: Account ID of the agent to remove

get.description: Returns all WhatsApp message templates for the current organization.

post.description: Creates a new WhatsApp message template.
Synchronizes templates with Meta's template library.

get.description: Returns a single template by ID.

post.description: Submits a template to Meta for approval.

get.description: Returns all outgoing webhooks for the current organization.

post.description: Creates a new outgoing webhook.

get.description: Returns a single webhook by ID.

post.description: Sends a test payload to a webhook.
